prompt: Create a "laugh out loud (LOL)" mood variation of this exact elephant character by changing facial expression only. CRITICAL: DO NOT draw any mouth shape at all (no open mouth, no smile mouth, no floating mouth) because trunk anatomy covers that area. Convey laughter only with joyful crescent/squint eyes, raised cheeks, playful eyebrows, and excited expression marks while keeping the trunk exactly unchanged from the reference. Keep body pose, head position, limb positions, silhouette, camera framing, orientation, scale, and proportions exactly the same. Keep line style, stroke thickness, and exact color palette. No new colors. Soft, cute, kid-friendly. White background.
